text: ' shyr hshyrym 'shr lshlmh
b yshqny mnshyqvt fyhv khy tvbym ddykh myyn
g lrych shmnykh tvbym shmn tvrq shmkh 'l khn 'lmvt 'hbvkh
d mshkhny 'chrykh nrvtsh hby'ny hmlkh chdryv ngylh vnshmchh bkh--nzkhyrh ddykh myyn myshrym 'hbvkh {f}
h shchvrh 'ny vn'vh bnvt yrvshlm kh'hly qdr khyry'vt shlmh
v 'l tr'vny sh'ny shchrchrt shshzftny hshmsh bny 'my nchrv by shmny ntrh 't hkhrmym--khrmy shly l' ntrty
z hgydh ly sh'hbh nfshy 'ykhh tr'h 'ykhh trbyts btshrym shlmh 'hyh kh'tyh 'l 'dry chbrykh
ch 'm l' td'y lkh hyfh bnshym ts'y lkh b'qby hts'n vr'y 't gdytykh 'l mshkhnvt hr'ym {f}
t lssty brkhby fr'h dmytykh r'yty
y n'vv lchyykh btrym tsv'rkh bchrvzym
y' tvry zhb n'shh lkh 'm nqdvt hkhsf
yb 'd shhmlkh bmsbv nrdy ntn rychv
yg tsrvr hmr dvdy ly byn shdy ylyn
yd 'shkhl hkhfr dvdy ly bkhrmy 'yn gdy {s}
tv hnkh yfh r'yty hnkh yfh 'ynykh yvnym
tz hnkh yfh dvdy 'f n'ym 'f 'rshnv r'nnh
yz qrvt btynv 'rzym rchytnv (rhytnv) brvtym
' 'ny chbtslt hshrvn shvshnt h'mqym
b khshvshnh byn hchvchym khn r'yty byn hbnvt
g khtfvch b'tsy hy'r khn dvdy byn hbnym btslv chmdty vyshbty vfryv mtvq lchkhy
d hby'ny 'l byt hyyn vdglv 'ly 'hbh
h smkhvny b'shyshvt--rfdvny btfvchym khy chvlt 'hbh 'ny
v shm'lv tcht lr'shy vymynv tchbqny
z hshb'ty 'tkhm bnvt yrvshlm btsb'vt 'v b'ylvt hshdh 'm t'yrv v'm t'vrrv 't h'hbh 'd shtchfts {s}
ch qvl dvdy hnh zh b' mdlg 'l hhrym--mqfts 'l hgb'vt
t dvmh dvdy ltsby 'v l'fr h'ylym hnh zh 'vmd 'chr khtlnv--mshgych mn hchlnvt mtsyts mn hchrkhym
y 'nh dvdy v'mr ly qvmy lkh r'yty yfty vlkhy lkh
y' khy hnh hstv 'br hgshm chlf hlkh lv
yb hntsnym nr'v b'rts 't hzmyr hgy' vqvl htvr nshm' b'rtsnv
yg ht'nh chnth fgyh vhgfnym smdr ntnv rych qvmy lkhy (lkh) r'yty yfty vlkhy lkh {s}
yd yvnty bchgvy hsl' bstr hmdrgh hr'yny 't mr'ykh hshmy'ny 't qvlkh khy qvlkh 'rb vmr'ykh n'vh {s}
tv 'chzv lnv sh'lym--sh'lym qtnym mchblym khrmym vkhrmynv smdr
tz dvdy ly v'ny lv hr'h bshvshnym
yz 'd shyfvch hyvm vnsv htsllym sb dmh lkh dvdy ltsby 'v l'fr h'ylym--'l hry btr {s}
' 'l mshkhby blylvt bqshty 't sh'hbh nfshy bqshtyv vl' mts'tyv
b 'qvmh n' v'svbbh b'yr bshvqym vbrchbvt--'bqshh 't sh'hbh nfshy bqshtyv vl' mts'tyv
g mts'vny hshmrym hsbbym b'yr 't sh'hbh nfshy r'ytm
d khm't sh'brty mhm 'd shmts'ty 't sh'hbh nfshy 'chztyv vl' 'rfnv--'d shhby'tyv 'l byt 'my v'l chdr hvrty
h hshb'ty 'tkhm bnvt yrvshlm btsb'vt 'v b'ylvt hshdh 'm t'yrv v'm t'vrrv 't h'hbh 'd shtchfts {s}
v my z't 'lh mn hmdbr khtymrvt 'shn mqtrt mr vlbvnh mkhl 'bqt rvkhl
z hnh mttv shlshlmh--shshym gbrym sbyb lh mgbry yshr'l
ch khlm 'chzy chrb mlmdy mlchmh 'ysh chrbv 'l yrkhv mfchd blylvt {s}
t 'fryvn 'shh lv hmlkh shlmh--m'tsy hlbnvn
y 'mvdyv 'shh khsf rfydtv zhb mrkhbv 'rgmn tvkhv rtsvf 'hbh mbnvt yrvshlm
y' ts'nh vr'ynh bnvt tsyvn bmlkh shlmh--b'trh sh'trh lv 'mv byvm chtntv vbyvm shmcht lbv {s}
' hnkh yfh r'yty hnkh yfh--'ynykh yvnym mb'd ltsmtkh sh'rkh kh'dr h'zym shglshv mhr gl'd
b shnykh kh'dr hqtsvbvt sh'lv mn hrchtsh shkhlm mt'ymvt vshkhlh 'yn bhm
g khchvt hshny shftvtykh vmdbrkh n'vh khflch hrmvn rqtkh mb'd ltsmtkh
d khmgdl dvyd tsv'rkh bnvy ltlfyvt 'lf hmgn tlvy 'lyv khl shlty hgbrym
h shny shdykh khshny 'frym t'vmy tsbyh hrv'ym bshvshnym
v 'd shyfvch hyvm vnsv htsllym--'lkh ly 'l hr hmvr v'l gb't hlbvnh
z khlkh yfh r'yty vmvm 'yn bkh {s}
ch 'ty mlbnvn khlh 'ty mlbnvn tbv'y tshvry mr'sh 'mnh mr'sh shnyr vchrmvn mm'nvt 'ryvt mhrry nmrym
t lbbtny 'chty khlh lbbtny b'chd (b'cht) m'ynykh b'chd 'nq mtsvrnykh
y mh yfv ddykh 'chty khlh mh tbv ddykh myyn vrych shmnykh mkhl bshmym
y' nft ttfnh shftvtykh khlh dbsh vchlb tcht lshvnkh vrych shlmtykh khrych lbnvn {s}
yb gn n'vl 'chty khlh gl n'vl m'yn chtvm
yg shlchykh frds rmvnym 'm fry mgdym khfrym 'm nrdym
yd nrd vkhrkhm qnh vqnmvn 'm khl 'tsy lbvnh mr v'hlvt 'm khl r'shy bshmym
tv m'yn gnym b'r mym chyym vnzlym mn lbnvn
tz 'vry tsfvn vbv'y tymn hfychy gny yzlv bshmyv yb' dvdy lgnv vy'khl fry mgdyv
' b'ty lgny 'chty khlh--'ryty mvry 'm bshmy 'khlty y'ry 'm dbshy shtyty yyny 'm chlby 'khlv r'ym shtv vshkhrv dvdym {s}
b 'ny yshnh vlby 'r qvl dvdy dvfq ftchy ly 'chty r'yty yvnty tmty--shr'shy nml' tl qvtsvty rsysy lylh
g fshtty 't khtnty--'ykhkhh 'lbshnh rchtsty 't rgly 'ykhkhh 'tnfm
d dvdy shlch ydv mn hchr vm'y hmv 'lyv
h qmty 'ny lftch ldvdy vydy ntfv mvr v'tsb'ty mvr 'br 'l khfvt hmn'vl
v ftchty 'ny ldvdy vdvdy chmq 'br nfshy yts'h bdbrv--bqshtyhv vl' mts'tyhv qr'tyv vl' 'nny
z mts'ny hshmrym hsbbym b'yr hkhvny fts'vny nsh'v 't rdydy m'ly shmry hchmvt
ch hshb'ty 'tkhm bnvt yrvshlm 'm tmts'v 't dvdy--mh tgydv lv shchvlt 'hbh 'ny
t mh dvdkh mdvd hyfh bnshym mh dvdkh mdvd shkhkhh hshb'tnv
y dvdy tsch v'dvm dgvl mrbbh
y' r'shv khtm fz qvtsvtyv tltlym shchrvt kh'vrb
yb 'ynyv khyvnym 'l 'fyqy mym rchtsvt bchlb--yshbvt 'l ml't
yg lchyv kh'rvgt hbshm mgdlvt mrqchym shftvtyv shvshnym--ntfvt mvr 'br
yd ydyv glyly zhb mml'ym btrshysh m'yv 'sht shn m'lft sfyrym
tv shvqyv 'mvdy shsh mysdym 'l 'dny fz mr'hv khlbnvn--bchvr kh'rzym
tz chkhv mmtqym vkhlv mchmdym zh dvdy vzh r'y bnvt yrvshlm
' 'nh hlkh dvdkh hyfh bnshym 'nh fnh dvdkh vnbqshnv 'mkh
b dvdy yrd lgnv l'rgvt hbshm--lr'vt bgnym vllqt shvshnym
g 'ny ldvdy vdvdy ly hr'h bshvshnym {s}
d yfh 't r'yty khtrtsh n'vh khyrvshlm 'ymh khndglvt
h hsby 'ynykh mngdy shhm hrhybny sh'rkh kh'dr h'zym shglshv mn hgl'd
v shnykh kh'dr hrchlym sh'lv mn hrchtsh shkhlm mt'ymvt vshkhlh 'yn bhm
z khflch hrmvn rqtkh mb'd ltsmtkh
ch shshym hmh mlkhvt vshmnym fylgshym v'lmvt 'yn msfr
t 'cht hy' yvnty tmty--'cht hy' l'mh brh hy' lyvldth r'vh bnvt vy'shrvh mlkhvt vfylgshym vyhllvh {s}
y my z't hnshqfh khmv shchr yfh khlbnh brh khchmh--'ymh khndglvt {s}
y' 'l gnt 'gvz yrdty lr'vt b'by hnchl lr'vt hfrchh hgfn hntsv hrmnym
yb l' yd'ty--nfshy shmtny mrkhbvt 'my ndyb
' shvby shvby hshvlmyt shvby shvby vnchzh bkh mh tchzv bshvlmyt khmchlt hmchnym
b mh yfv f'mykh bn'lym bt ndyb chmvqy yrkhykh--khmv chl'ym m'shh ydy 'mn
g shrrkh 'gn hshr 'l ychsr hmzg btnkh 'rmt chtym svgh bshvshnym
d shny shdykh khshny 'frym t'my tsbyh
h tsv'rkh khmgdl hshn 'ynykh brkhvt bchshbvn 'l sh'r bt rbym--'fkh khmgdl hlbnvn tsvfh fny dmshq
v r'shkh 'lykh khkhrml vdlt r'shkh kh'rgmn mlkh 'svr brhtym
z mh yfyt vmh n'mt--'hbh bt'nvgym
ch z't qvmtkh dmth ltmr vshdykh l'shkhlvt
t 'mrty ''lh btmr 'chzh bsnsnyv vyhyv n' shdykh kh'shkhlvt hgfn vrych 'fkh khtfvchym
y vchkhkh khyyn htvb hvlkh ldvdy lmyshrym dvbb shfty yshnym
y' 'ny ldvdy v'ly tshvqtv {s}
yb lkhh dvdy nts' hshdh nlynh bkhfrym
yg nshkhymh lkhrmym--nr'h 'm frchh hgfn ftch hsmdr hntsv hrmvnym shm 'tn 't ddy lkh [ (Song of Solomon 7:14) yd hdvd'ym ntnv rych v'l ftchynv khl mgdym--chdshym gm yshnym dvdy tsfnty lkh ]
' my ytnkh kh'ch ly yvnq shdy 'my 'mts'kh bchvts 'shqkh gm l' ybzv ly
b 'nhgkh 'by'kh 'l byt 'my--tlmdny 'shqkh myyn hrqch m'sys rmny
g shm'lv tcht r'shy vymynv tchbqny
d hshb'ty 'tkhm bnvt yrvshlm mh t'yrv vmh t'rrv 't h'hbh 'd shtchfts {s}
h my z't 'lh mn hmdbr mtrfqt 'l dvdh tcht htfvch 'vrrtykh--shmh chbltkh 'mkh shmh chblh yldtkh
v shymny khchvtm 'l lbkh khchvtm 'l zrv'kh--khy 'zh khmvt 'hbh qshh khsh'vl qn'h rshfyh--rshfy 'sh shlhbtyh
z mym rbym l' yvkhlv lkhbvt 't h'hbh vnhrvt l' yshtfvh 'm ytn 'ysh 't khl hvn bytv b'hbh--bvz ybvzv lv {s}
ch 'chvt lnv qtnh vshdym 'yn lh mh n'shh l'chtnv byvm shydbr bh
t 'm chvmh hy' nbnh 'lyh tyrt khsf v'm dlt hy' ntsvr 'lyh lvch 'rz
y 'ny chvmh vshdy khmgdlvt 'z hyyty b'ynyv khmvts't shlvm {f}
y' khrm hyh lshlmh bb'l hmvn ntn 't hkhrm lntrym 'ysh yb' bfryv 'lf khsf
yb khrmy shly lfny h'lf lkh shlmh vm'tym lntrym 't fryv
yg hyvshbt bgnym chbrym mqshybym lqvlkh--hshmy'ny
yd brch dvdy vdmh lkh ltsby 'v l'fr h'ylym--'l hry bshmym {sh}
